caption: A man with a beard and a shaved head is recording in a studio against a backdrop of dark grey acoustic foam panels. He wears a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. A silver professional microphone is positioned in front of him, mounted on a boom arm that features the text "Rode Podcast Air XLR". As the sequence progresses, the man speaks with an animated expression. He initially gestures with his right hand, which is visible and slightly blurred due to motion, while his mouth is open. In the following moments, his hand moves out of the frame as he continues to talk, shifting his gaze slightly. His facial expressions vary from an open-mouthed, emphatic delivery to a more closed-mouth, focused expression. Tattoos are visible on his right arm.
